Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Vic Damone appear in sketches about air travel, taboo commercials, and "The Old Folks"
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Vic Damone

Video.summary: In "The Family", Ed is going on an out-of-town trip...but Eunice and Mickey want to come along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Durward Kirby get into the ring for the boxing movie spoof, "Goldman's Boy."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond

Image.alt: Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond

Video.summary: Robert Goulet, Rich Little & Pat Carroll guest. Rich impresses while Robert & Pat join "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Video.summary: Rock Hudson plays a man on the prowl for the ladies in a bar. Also, Tim is a television announcer.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke is Carol's guest, lending his impressive talents to an homage to Shirley Temple films.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke

Video.summary: Vincent Price stars in a salute to horror. George imagines he is gambler, & a pregnant pause on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Vincent Price

Video.summary: Dick Martin is the town gigolo on "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a spoof of "Sunset Boulevard."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Dick Martin

Video.summary: Guest Shirley MacLaine joins Carol in sharing some of their fan mail.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley MacLaine

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby appear in "Science Fiction Playhouse." "Carol & Sis" features Carol intoxicated.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Carol welcomes Vincent Price and Joan Rivers!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joan Rivers, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Lucy and Carol play rival Rent-A-Car agents vying for Tim's business.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring

Video.summary: Carol's series premiere guest is Jim Nabors. Plus "V.I.P." interview with Shirley Dimple.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Soupy Sales and Carol play a pair of shoppers browsing samples of sexy cologne.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Soupy Sales

Video.summary: The cast of "The Carol Burnett Show" revisits some of their favorite moments from the show.
Video.title: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Image.alt: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers
The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters are tonight's musical guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: "The Family" steps out as Mama, Eunice, and Ed go to a fancy restaurant, and Tim's "Oldest Man" is a sheriff.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Debbie Reynolds and John Davidson guest star, highlighted by the stirring saga So Proudly We Heal.
Video.title: Debbie Reynolds, John Davidson

Video.summary: Guest Steve Lawrence appears in a WWII spoof, and Carol sings "You Light Up My Life" while bathing Tim.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters join Carol in a rockin' musical spoof of "Cinderella" in tonight's episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry is back to sing and dance his way into your heart.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Rita Moreno guest stars as a nurse to the accident-prone Carol. Also featured: Tim as a hapless officer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rita Moreno

Video.summary: In this episode, Carol contends with a peeping tom. Later, Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim offer up a concert.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol contends with a peeping tom. Later, Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim offer up a concert.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Harvey Korman leads a "Fireside Chat" with the First Family.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marily Horne

Video.summary: Ross Martin and John Davidson guest! John shows off his pipes, and Harvey is interrupted by an extortionist.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Features commercial spoofs, Harvey trying to give a speech, and Carol demonstrating how nobody notices her.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry takes part in a series of sketches highlighted by his role as a lawyer facing off with Tim.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest Stars Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray, and Don Rickles pitch in to help tell "The Tin Pan Alley Story."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Image.alt: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Peter Lawford guests. Sketches include an evening with "Carol & Sis", and Lawford wooing his mail order bride.
Video.title: Peter Lawford

Video.summary: Invisible dogs run amok in an obedience class, while insurance agent Carol pesters doctor Tim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Andy Griffith guests, retelling a familiar Aesop tale, then joining Carol for a musical number: "Cinderellie."
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: Step back in time with "The Family" as Eunice thinks back to her early days. Also, Tim plays a palace guard.
Video.title: Family Show
